name: Chessington World of Adventures Resort
city: Leatherhead Road, Chessington KT9 2NE, Greater London
description: Chessington World of Adventures Resort is a 128 acre theme park, zoo and hotel complex in Chessington, Greater London, England, around 12 mi southwest of Central London.  The complex originally opened as Chessington Zoo in 1931; the theme park aspect was developed by The Tussauds Group, debuting on 7 July 1987 as one of the first combined animal-amusement parks in the UK.  The theme park, which features over 40 rides, is owned by Merlin Entertainments, following its merger with The Tussauds Group in 2007.
